title: Worst Job in the Evaverse
wikitext:
[]: Worst Job in the Evaverse             Quote Post by Lurkis » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:05 pm Time for a random discussion. Just finished watching You Are (Not) Alone again and I had a thought; 'Cleaning up all that blood after the angels are destroyed must be the worst job ever o.o.' So my question to you is, what do you think would be the worst job to have in the evaverse? (Rebuild or otherwise). Jobs must specific to the evaverse, so no 'coffee shop' answers please XD

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:18 pm School teacher spreading propaganda.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:20 pm Janitor.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:23 pm Dream wrote: Janitor.

[]:             Quote Post by Lurkis » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:41 pm riffraff11235 wrote: After what happened in End of Evangelion. Other than that probably the people who man that destroyer that's floating in Terminal Dogma next to Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:44 pm That one solider that got shot by Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:45 pm There was three

[]:             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:48 pm The bartenders who aren't doing their job telling Misato that she's had enough drinks.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:49 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: That one solider that got shot by Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:53 pm riffraff11235 wrote: But she said "No hard feelings". That must count for something....

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:53 pm Xard wrote: There was three

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Oct 29, 2012 5:57 pm Gus Hanson wrote: The bartenders who aren't doing their job telling Misato that she's had enough drinks.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:34 pm The team that has to take care of the Eva's routine biological functions.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:37 pm Fireand'chutes77 wrote: The team that has to take care of the Eva's routine biological functions.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:38 pm That guy who has to clean the piss out of the Eva plugs.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:43 pm The local psychologist and the people who work in his clinic.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:44 pm Is that because of the lack of business he's getting?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:48 pm Stryker wrote: Is that because of the lack of business he's getting?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:48 pm CJD wrote: The local psychologist and the people who work in his clinic.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Oct 29, 2012 6:51 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Considering The mental states of both Shinji and Asuka their doing a sub-par job.
